actions.title: PCB inspection of Central Industrial Cluster
actions.description: 36 locations show simultaneous high temperature, bare land, and dry soil — environmental signature of active industrial pollution. Immediate on-site inspection required.
actions.estimated_impact: Prevent further land degradation in 36 flagged locations

actions.title: PCB inspection of Narol Chemical Zone
actions.description: 2 locations show simultaneous high temperature, bare land, and dry soil — environmental signature of active industrial pollution. Immediate on-site inspection required.
actions.estimated_impact: Prevent further land degradation in 2 flagged locations

actions.title: Cool roof mandate for top hottest ward locations
actions.description: 10 locations with LST above 36.5°C in dense urban areas where tree plantation is not feasible. Cool roof coating mandate recommended for all new constructions.

triggered_by.finding: High LST in dense urban areas

actions.estimated_impact: Reduce indoor temperatures and surface heat

actions.title: Monthly satellite monitoring protocol for vegetation recovery
actions.description: 83.1% of Ahmedabad shows stressed or barren vegetation. A monthly NDVI monitoring protocol using Sentinel-2 data will track recovery after interventions.
